_comment: TEMPLATE (FRAMEWORK.md §C11.6). A plugin bundles your capability layer for reuse. Claude uses <plugin>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json. Codex uses <plugin>/.codex-plugin/plugin.json plus a marketplace entry, commonly under .agents/plugins/marketplace.json for repo-scoped discovery. Replace placeholders and delete _comment/_layout after copying.
name: <plugin-name>
